description: FaceCheck.ID is a reverse image face search service that finds public web pages where a submitted face appears and returns scored matches. It is used to search by face across publicly indexed websites and provides privacy/removal and account-based credit purchasing features.
summary: FaceCheck exposes two HTTP integration surfaces: a token-authenticated REST face-search API with an OpenAPI spec, and a public x402 pay-per-call reverse-face-search endpoint for AI agents; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI was found.
